plan.description: Architecture, research, and specification writing. Analyzes codebases, writes structured specs with acceptance criteria, decomposes work into tasks. Never modifies files directly.

build.description: Implementation agent. Reads specs from specs/<feature>/spec.md and state.json, executes tasks in dependency order, updates state.json status fields, runs verify commands.

explore.description: Fast read-only codebase exploration. Use for searching files, understanding structure, finding patterns across the target project.

edit.description: Targeted file editor. Given a specific task from a spec, makes precise edits to specific files. Receives task ID and spec path as input.

review.description: Cross-model code reviewer. Uses a different model family than the build agent for diversity of perspective. Reviews for correctness, security, maintainability, and spec compliance.

verify.description: Drift detection and acceptance criteria verification. Reads state.json, runs verify commands for completed tasks, reports pass/fail. Trust nothing — run tests yourself.

test.description: Test writer and runner. Generates unit/integration tests and executes them. Receives task context and target files.
